title: caldesia acanthocarpa
intro: Caldesia acanthocarpa, also known as the Australian water-dragon, is a type of aquatic plant native to Australia. This plant is said to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Caldesia acanthocarpa are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as having antifungal properties. However, I couldn't find information on the specific herbal preparations of Caldesia acanthocarpa, and further research is needed to confirm its medicinal uses.
